candidate_check.description: The ESXi host must not be configured to override virtual machine (VM) configurations.

check_content_excerpt:
From an ESXi shell, run the following command:

# stat -c "%s" /etc/vmware/settings

Expected result:

0

If the output does not match the expected result, this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt:
From an ESXi shell, run the following command:

# echo -n >/etc/vmware/settings
title: The ESXi host must not be configured to override virtual machine (VM) configurations.
